{"society_power": 2.0, "state_power": 9.0, "society_change": 0.5, "state_change": 0.5, "key_event": "WTO-driven boom and Olympics-era security consolidation", "reasoning": "Explosive growth, WTO accession, fiscal recentralization, and expanded surveillance pushed the Despotic Leviathan toward near-overwhelming penetration (9.0), while internet expansion, a rising middle class, and episodic mobilizations (SARS, Sichuan, Charter 08) modestly enlarged society (2.0) but were swiftly co-opted or suppressed, leaving it weak and atomized."}
